contact.title: Custom Offer — Personalized Discord Bots
contact.desc1: You have a specific idea or a unique need for your Discord server? I create custom bots tailored to your needs and your community.
contact.ul1: And much more: anything is possible, just ask!
contact.ol1: Contact me by email or on Discord: devbyfab
We discuss together all the features, commands, and specific needs for your bot.
The custom offer includes by default all features of the full pack (moderation, logs, database, paginations, DMs, etc.).
A fixed price is set once all features are chosen, depending on complexity and estimated time.
contact.final:
You only pay once everything is clear and validated.
Feel free to contact me to discuss your project, even if you just have an idea or a question!
home.heroTitle: DevByFab — Custom Discord bots & freelance dev
home.heroDesc: I create custom Discord bots, web tools, and solutions tailored to your needs. Reliable, fast, and attentive.
about.title: About me
about.desc: Passionate freelance developer, specialized in creating custom Discord bots and web solutions. Serious, versatile, and always attentive to your needs.
services.introTitle: Freelance service, custom Discord bot creation.
services.slogan: Your projects are unique, our solutions are authentic.

services.cards.title: Starter
services.cards.desc: Simple moderation commands and custom embed messages.

services.cards.title: Logs+
services.cards.desc: Add Discord event logs, advanced moderation, no database.

services.cards.title: Full Pack
services.cards.desc: Complete management: database, paginations, private messages, logs, moderation.

services.cards.title: Custom
services.cards.desc: Full customization: moderation, logs, database, paginations, embeds, DMs, Twitch API integration, streamer features…

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Full-stack, back-end and advanced tooling technical projects.
projects.card1.title: Chromium SaaS Extension — Manifest V3
projects.card1.desc: Full browser extension with SaaS architecture, subscription system, and secure back-end API.
projects.card2.title: TCG Ecosystem — Web App + Discord Bot
projects.card2.desc: Collectible card game platform with web interface, integrated Discord bot, and real-time battle system.
projects.card3.title: Python CLI — Hybrid Cryptography
projects.card3.desc: Command-line tool for hybrid file and message encryption, with RSA/AES key management.
